allow: PowerShell($global = npm root -g; ls "$global\\playwright" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls "$global\\@playwright" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server not reachable: $_" })
PowerShell($token = gh auth token; git remote set-url origin "https://$token@github.com/VictorGalvisS/uigen.git" && git push -u origin master)
